title: 03363_Learning_Mixtures_of_Markov_Chains_and_MDPs
positive_examples: The algorithm can efficiently cluster a mixture of time series data, which has applications in various fields such as psychology, economics, automobile sensing, biology, and neuroscience.
The method provides end-to-end performance guarantees, achieving high accuracy in clustering MDPs, which can improve decision-making processes in real-world applications.
